queue_item.action: Canonicalize JSON evidence before digesting so semantic equivalence is stable across serialization differences.

progress.finding: RFC 8785 canonical bytes remove whitespace and object-order variance from JSON digests while preserving arrays and ECMAScript primitive serialization.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
limits: duplicate property names require rejection by a duplicate-aware parser before canonicalization
canonicalization does not authenticate provenance or establish claim truth

queue_item.handoff: Update evidence-attestation.mjs to support an explicit RFC8785_JSON_SHA256 subject mode, reject duplicate-key raw JSON before parsing, and retain raw-byte SHA-256 for non-JSON subjects.

coordination.strategy: additive owner sidecar; ACTIVE_QUEUE.json not overwritten because it is a stale shared snapshot with concurrent team writes
